evidence.correctness_and_freshness: Mixes v1 and v2 patterns inconsistently. PhonePe PG v2 (post-2024) uses OAuth Bearer tokens (Authorization: O-Bearer <token>) and does NOT use X-VERIFY checksums — X-VERIFY is the v1 Standard Checkout pattern. Also the status check uses the same /pay endpoint (wrong) and v2 response shape with instrumentResponse.redirectInfo is v1 shape. Internal consistency is poor: claims v2 but uses v1 auth. Version claimed but inconsistent.
evidence.executability: Code blocks parse. Relative import `from ..config` will fail because main.py imports `routes.payment` as top-level (not a package). Missing `react-router-dom` install. Otherwise runnable on sandbox-feasible patterns; no ngrok/sudo.
evidence.completeness: (a) credential acquisition described; (b) pip+npm installs present; (c) env template present with exact names; (d) backend code in fenced blocks; (e) React code present; (f) pytest test command present. All six covered. Some duplication of credentials between sections.
evidence.citation_anchoring: Cites developer.phonepe.com (canonical) for several sections inline as [3][4], plus Medium and business.phonepe.com. Source [6] truncated. Mix of official and third-party with official inline anchoring.

rubric_notes: docs_unavailable=true; applied long-tail handling. Playbook claims v2 but the X-VERIFY + instrumentResponse.redirectInfo pattern is canonical v1 Standard Checkout — internal inconsistency is severe enough to cap correctness at 2 despite version claim.
